channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: The crescent dog poo bin has bags around it, 9th May
item.description:
Full up bin in the crescent. Lots of dog poo bags just left in situ on the crescent next to the bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cloudesley Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inside communal hallway, 9th May
item.description:
Electrical goods and rubbish dumped by neighbours , I am at 119 Cronin street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cronin Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint Dillard, 9th May
item.description:
Old Kent Road /New Cross Road by Whitepost street Large paint spillage on Road. Given the location Lewisham Street cleansing would not be able to assist

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 888, Old Kent Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged pavement, 9th May
item.description:
The pavement has been damaged and has also damaged and lifted a BT manhole cover

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped furniture outside NISA, 9th May
item.description:
Flytipped furniture outside NISA

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A number of split bin bags on pavement, 9th May
item.description:
There are a number of bin bags full of rubbish dumped on the pavement. These have spilled detritus onto the pavement and road. There is an issue with flytipping at the Croydon Road end of Groveland Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groveland Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sand used to soak up leaking petrol in gutter, 9th May
item.description:
There is a lot of sand in the gutter which was used to soak up leaking petrol. It's being spread everywhere and smells.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wiring left after street light repair, 9th May
item.description:
This wiring has been left for quite some time, and has presented a trip hazard to my elderly in laws who use the path frequently. It it attached so we cannot remove ourselves.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dashwood Close, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped settee and timber at south end of Prior Street, 9th May
item.description:
This broken furniture and woodwork on the pavement by the junction if Royal Hill and Prior St, SE10 (photo taken 8 May 2026) has been there at least a week: looks like flytipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prior Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside … in the ramp, 9th May
item.description:
Broken slab is a hazard for children and older pedestrians.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33-35, Netherhall Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting on traffic light controller cabinet, 9th May
item.description:
Flyposting on a TfL traffic light controller cabinet (Telent). The cabinet is covered in torn posters, including one for a Brixton event.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Loughborough Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked on pavement behind bus stop blocking access, 9th May
item.description:
Car is parked on pavement blocking access to bus stop. This happens regularly and needs stopping as makes it dangerous for wheelchairs and pedestrians with buggies and children. Please help. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Grange Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bike hangar, 9th May
item.description:
Graffiti on a green bike hangar.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34B, Sutherland Square, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest hire bikes parked dangerously, 9th May
item.description:
Overcrowded Forest hire bikes parked dangerously outside TWG Tea on Swiss Court

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A lot of rubbish, 9th May
item.description:
A lot of rubbish at the back of Woolwich, poly school for boys it is a fire hazard and needs to be sorted as soon as possible as this is a fire evacuation area for Woolwich Poly school for Boys
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hampstead Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous, 9th May
item.description:
Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass scattered across pavement, 9th May
item.description:
There is a large amount of broken glass scattered across the pavement and along the kerb edge, creating a hazard for pedestrians, cyclists and pets. The glass has been there since 9 May and is spread across the walking route, making it difficult to avoid safely. Please could this be cleared as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Cutcombe Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Need all cutting back, 9th May
item.description:
All need cutting back
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Campion Place, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking Restrictions Sign Bent, 9th May
item.description:
The parking restrictions sign outside the Christ Central church building has been moved and is not easily read. Please can you arrange for this to be restored? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In the sedgemere road, 9th May
item.description:
Since last wednesday, there are boxes and foams on the road. Affecting pedestrians' walking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sedgemere Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
